selectionCriteria.note: First formal batch. Manually selected to continue chapters already opened. Diversity constraint (max 3 per chapter) waived for this bootstrapping batch; enforced from batch-2026-03-22-b onward.

normalizationRules: Only normalize when every returned branch shares the same base customs-duty outcome
Do not treat conditional end-use, airworthiness, quota, or control measures as base MFN duty
If branches diverge materially → route to blocked_with_guidance
Record raw API response in data/raw/eu/ before normalizing
